forgotPassword.title: Tettuḍ awal n uɛeddi
forgotPassword.description: Sekcem tansa n yimayl-ik, ad ak-d-nazen aseγwen i uɛawed n usbeddi.
forgotPassword.successDescription: Ma yella tansa-agi tella deg unagraw-nneγ, ad tremseḍ imayl.
forgotPassword.emailSentDescription: Ma yella imayl-agi yeqqen γer umiḍan, ad d-tremseḍ aseγwen n uɛawed deg kra n tesdatin.
forgotPassword.checkSpam: Wali deg umeskar n yiznan inuḍafen ma ur d-yewwiḍ ara yimayl.

resetPassword.title: Awal n uɛeddi amaynut
resetPassword.description: Fren awal n uɛeddi amaynut yettwaḥerzen i umiḍan-ik.
resetPassword.passwordHint: Adasil 12 n yisekkilen akked usekkil ameqqran, ameẓyan, uṭṭun, d usekkil uslig.
resetPassword.passwordRequirements: Awal n uɛeddi ilaq ad yesɛu usekkil ameqqran, ameẓyan, d uṭṭun
resetPassword.submit: Ales asbeddi n wawal n uɛeddi
resetPassword.successDescription: Awal n uɛeddi yettwabeddel akken iwata. Tzemreḍ ad tkecmeḍ tura.
resetPassword.redirecting: Ad ak-nawi γer usebter n unekcum...
resetPassword.error: Tuccḍa deg uɛawed n usbeddi n wawal n uɛeddi
resetPassword.invalidToken: Aseγwen n uɛawed n usbeddi d arameγtu neγ yemmet.
resetPassword.invalidTokenDescription: Aseγwen-agi n uɛawed n usbeddi d arameγtu neγ yemmet. Suter aseγwen amaynut.
